changeSummary: Decreased cooldown from 30s to 20s
changeText: Decreased cooldown from 30s to 20s.

changeSummary: Added the ability for Dome Shields to block the Winch Claw
changeText: Added the ability for Dome Shields to block the Winch Claw.
devNote: The Winch Claw has been dominating the Heavy meta and this adjustment offers more counter-play.

changeSummary: Increased outer radius from 5m to 5.5m
changeText: Increased outer radius from 5m to 5.5m.
devNote: Small power adjustment to improve the Frag Grenade without overcorrecting its already high usage.

changeSummary: Increased max damage radius from 2.5m to 2.75m
changeText: Increased max damage radius from 2.5m to 2.75m.
devNote: Small power adjustment to improve the Frag Grenade without overcorrecting its already high usage.

changeSummary: Decreased cooldown from 30s to 24s
changeText: Decreased cooldown from 30s to 24s.

changeSummary: Decreased max range from 70m to 50m
changeText: Decreased max range from 70m to 50m.
devNote: Gateway was allowing very long, very fast rotations and cannibalizing the value of items like Zipline.

changeSummary: Decreased ammo count from 2 to 1
changeText: Decreased ammo count from 2 to 1.
devNote: Requires players to be more accurate with Glitch Grenade usage rather than relying on an immediate second grenade.

changeSummary: Decreased cooldown from 20s to 12s
changeText: Decreased cooldown from 20s to 12s.
devNote: Shorter cooldown keeps missed throws from being overly punishing after the ammo-count reduction.

changeSummary: Increased explosive damage multiplier versus goo from 2.0 to 2.25
changeText: Increased explosive damage multiplier versus goo from 2.0 to 2.25, making explosive items remove goo faster.
devNote: Goo has become highly effective in the current meta, so this offers stronger explosive counterplay.

changeSummary: Increased explosive damage multiplier versus goo from 2.0 to 2.25
changeText: Increased explosive damage multiplier versus goo from 2.0 to 2.25, making explosive items remove goo faster.
devNote: Goo has become highly effective in the current meta, so this offers stronger explosive counterplay.

changeSummary: Decreased cooldown from 30s to 24s
changeText: Decreased cooldown from 30s to 24s.

changeSummary: Decreased explosive damage from 80 to 55
changeText: Decreased explosive damage from 80 to 55.
devNote: Pyro Mine was cannibalizing the role of the Explosive Mine too much.

changeSummary: Decreased fuse time from 2.5s to 1.75s
changeText: Decreased fuse time from 2.5s to 1.75s.

changeSummary: Decreased cooldown from 45s to 35s
changeText: Decreased cooldown from 45s to 35s.

changeSummary: Reduced lingering smoke after detonation
changeText: Decreased the amount of lingering smoke, making it easier to see after it detonates.

changeSummary: Increased damage from 100 to 110
changeText: Increased damage from 100 to 110.
devNote: Mostly targeted at improving the RPG’s effectiveness versus Goo without significantly affecting player versus player combat.

changeSummary: Increased max health from 750 to 850
changeText: Increased max health from 750 to 850.

changeSummary: Added the ability for Mesh Shields to block the Winch Claw
changeText: Added the ability for Mesh Shields to block the Winch Claw.
devNote: Adds Winch Claw counterplay and should increase the viability of Mesh Shield.

changeSummary: Dome Shield and Mesh Shield now block Winch Claw
changeText: Dome Shield and Mesh Shield now block Winch Claw, adding a clearer shield interaction and counterplay rule for the specialization.
devNote: Added here as requested so the Winch Claw archive also reflects the Dome Shield and Mesh Shield block interaction.

changeSummary: Decreased max stun duration from 0.65s to 0.5s
changeText: Decreased the max stun duration from 0.65s to 0.5s.
devNote: Aimed at addressing common frustrations when facing Winch Claw and bringing Heavy specializations closer in viability.

changeSummary: Decreased minimum stun duration from 0.35s to 0.2s
changeText: Decreased the minimum stun duration from 0.35s to 0.2s.
devNote: Aimed at addressing common frustrations when facing Winch Claw and bringing Heavy specializations closer in viability.

changeSummary: Winch Claw breaks if the victim is far from the initial collision point
changeText: Added functionality where, if the clawed victim is far away from the initial point of collision, the Winch Claw will break. This addresses cases where the Winch Claw could sometimes appear to grab players around walls.
devNote: Aimed at addressing common frustrations when facing Winch Claw and bringing Heavy specializations closer in viability.

changeSummary: Winch Claw retracts faster when it hits an object it cannot latch onto
changeText: Winch Claw now retracts as soon as it hits an object it can’t latch onto, reducing time spent lingering in the air.
devNote: Aimed at addressing common frustrations when facing Winch Claw and bringing Heavy specializations closer in viability.

changeSummary: Decreased damage from 26 to 24
changeText: Decreased damage from 26 to 24.
devNote: 93R was outperforming other top weapons, so these changes bring it closer in line.

changeSummary: Decreased damage falloff start range from 32m to 30m
changeText: Decreased the damage fall-off start range from 32m to 30m.
devNote: 93R was outperforming other top weapons, so these changes bring it closer in line.

changeSummary: Decreased damage falloff end range from 40m to 37.5m
changeText: Decreased the damage fall-off end range from 40m to 37.5m.
devNote: 93R was outperforming other top weapons, so these changes bring it closer in line.

changeSummary: Increased max-range falloff multiplier from 40% to 50%
changeText: Increased the damage fall-off multiplier at max range from 40% to 50%, meaning it does slightly more damage at long range.
devNote: 93R was outperforming other top weapons, so these changes bring it closer in line.

changeSummary: Decreased environmental damage from 130 to 95
changeText: Decreased environmental damage from 130 to 95.
devNote: BFR Titan balance is sensitive because its top-end performance is strong but its parameters can make it feel clunky.

changeSummary: Decreased rate of fire from 85 RPM to 82 RPM
changeText: Decreased the rate of fire from 85 RPM to 82 RPM.
devNote: BFR Titan balance is sensitive because its top-end performance is strong but its parameters can make it feel clunky.

changeSummary: Increased third attack damage from 65 to 100
changeText: Increased the damage of the third attack in the attack sequence from 65 to 100.
devNote: The full attack combo was not offering the payoff it deserved.

changeSummary: Decreased ADS bullet dispersion by approximately 30%
changeText: Decreased bullet dispersion across all stances when aiming down sights by approximately 30%, making the weapon more precise.
devNote: Pushes the KS-23’s dispersion in a similar direction to the positive BFR feel without making the two items too similar.

changeSummary: Increased damage from 22 to 23
changeText: Increased damage from 22 to 23.
devNote: Heavy LMGs have been somewhat ineffective compared to other Heavy options.

changeSummary: Slightly decreased ADS bullet dispersion while crouching or standing still
changeText: Decreased bullet dispersion slightly when crouching or standing still and aiming down sights, making the weapon more precise.
devNote: Aims to make the Minigun slightly easier to use without over-buffing top-end power.

changeSummary: Decreased vertical recoil during the first 8 bullets
changeText: Decreased the amount of vertical recoil during the first 8 bullets of the firing sequence, making the M60 slightly easier to control.

changeSummary: Slightly increased vertical recoil after the 30th bullet
changeText: Slightly increased the amount of vertical recoil after the 30th bullet in the firing sequence, making the M60 slightly harder to control during sustained firing.

changeSummary: Decreased tactical reload intro animation from 2.2s to 1.5s
changeText: Decreased tactical reload intro animation duration from 2.2s to 1.5s, meaning the weapon reloads faster.
devNote: Model 1887 reload animations have caused frustration, with reload checkpoint work still planned for the future.

changeSummary: Increased damage falloff start range from 10m to 15m
changeText: Increased the damage fall-off start range from 10m to 15m.

changeSummary: Increased damage falloff end range from 15m to 25m
changeText: Increased the damage fall-off end range from 15m to 25m.

changeSummary: Increased max-range falloff multiplier from 62% to 65%
changeText: Increased the damage fall-off multiplier at max range from 62% to 65%, meaning it does slightly more damage at long range.

changeSummary: APS Turret updated for stronger uptime with cooldown tradeoffs
changeText: Projectiles blocked increased from 5 to 6; health increased from 160 to 175. Cooldown no longer regenerates while deployed. Manual retrieve cooldown is 5s, remote retrieve cooldown is 15s, and destroyed APS cooldown is 30s.
devNote: APS had fallen out of the meta; durability and projectile-block buffs are offset by stricter cooldown behavior.

changeSummary: Breach Charge arm time decreased from 1.5s to 1s
changeText: Decreased arm time from 1.5s to 1s. Arm time remains 1.5s when attached to a carriable.
devNote: Quality-of-life responsiveness improvement while keeping extra defense against carriable nukes.

changeSummary: Data Reshaper can disable Gateways
changeText: Added the ability to reshape Gateways to immediately disable them.
devNote: Adds a direct Gateway counter for Medium loadouts.

changeSummary: Hover Pad health increased from 350 to 425
changeText: Increased health from 350 to 425.
devNote: Improves survivability for an item with useful but vulnerable setups.

changeSummary: Added Stamina and Precision as part of the melee rework
changeText: Added Stamina and Precision. Stamina regen is 2s. Primary precise damage is 60 and base/glancing damage is 42. Attack movement speed reduced from sprint speed to run speed. Sweep range reduced by about 0.5m. Primary lunge increased from 3m to 4.5m; lunge target angle decreased from 25° to 20°; precision zone angle is 9°. Backstab multiplier increased from 4.26 to 4.5; charge time reduced from 0.8s to 0.65s; adds small pushback; backstab lunge increased from 3m to 4.5m; backstab lunge target angle decreased from 25° to 20°.
devNote: Melee now uses Stamina for lunge availability and Precision zones for precise versus glancing damage.

changeSummary: Added Stamina and Precision; added Cross Slash from Deflect
changeText: Added Stamina and Precision. Stamina regen is 3s. Primary sequence removed the cross-swipe, leaving two double-swipes. Precise damage is 57 x 2 and base/glancing damage is 39 x 2. Lunge remains 4.5m; target angle decreased from 25° to 20°; precision zone angle is 8°. Deflect movement speed reduced by 50% and deflect damage multiplier increased from 0.1 to 0.2. Added Cross Slash from Deflect stance with 140 precise damage, 84 base/glancing damage, 5m lunge, small pushback, and 8° precision zone.
devNote: Melee now uses Stamina for lunge availability and Precision zones for precise versus glancing damage.

changeSummary: Added Stamina and Precision; Shield Block and Shield Bash updated
changeText: Added Stamina and Precision. Stamina regen is 3s. Primary precise damage is 82 and base/glancing damage is 57. Sweep range reduced by 0.5m. Lunge increased from 3m to 4m; lunge target angle decreased from 40° to 20°; precision zone angle is 9°. Shield Block now provides full frontal protection, blocking movement speed is reduced by 25%, and melee blocking reliability improved. Added Shield Bash from Shield Block with 40 damage, about 3m lunge, and about 5m knockback.
devNote: Melee now uses Stamina for lunge availability and Precision zones for precise versus glancing damage.

changeSummary: Added Stamina and Precision with higher precise damage values
changeText: Added Stamina and Precision. Stamina regen is 2s. Primary precise damage is 120 and base/glancing damage is 90. Primary lunge increased from 4.5m to 5m; target angle decreased from 25° to 20°; precision zone angle is 10°. Secondary precise damage is 200 and base/glancing damage is 150. Secondary adds small pushback; lunge increased from 4.5m to 5m; target angle decreased from 25° to 20°; precision zone angle is 10°.
devNote: Melee now uses Stamina for lunge availability and Precision zones for precise versus glancing damage.

changeSummary: Added Stamina and Precision; primary and spin attacks reworked
changeText: Added Stamina and Precision. Stamina regen is 3s. Primary sequence reduced from three attacks to two and the old 65/80/90 scaling sequence was removed. Primary precise damage is 74 and base/glancing damage is 55. Primary lunge decreased from 7.5m to 5m; target angle decreased from 30° to 20°; precision zone angle is 8°. Secondary spin attack was reworked: old 100-damage-per-spin three-spin sequence over 2.66s removed; new spin damage is 75 / 100 / 126 with durations of 0.8s / 0.75s / 1.1s. Each spin requires stamina; hits regenerate stamina to allow chaining; spin does not use Precision.
devNote: Melee now uses Stamina for lunge availability and Precision zones for precise versus glancing damage.

changeSummary: Added Stamina and Precision; primary and secondary lunges updated
changeText: Added Stamina and Precision. Stamina regen is 2s. Primary precise damage is 110 and base/glancing damage is 71. Primary attack sweep updated to match the animation. Primary lunge increased from 3m to 4.25m; target angle decreased from 25° to 20°; precision zone angle is 9°. Secondary lunge now requires stamina for max range. Secondary lunge with stamina increased from about 9m to about 10m; without stamina is about 5m. Forward clamp angle increased from 40° to 110°.
devNote: Melee now uses Stamina for lunge availability and Precision zones for precise versus glancing damage.

changeSummary: Cloaking Device duration and energy consumption adjusted
changeText: Minimum cloak duration decreased from about 13s to about 11s. Energy consumption changed from linear to discrete: minimum consumption applies below run speed, and maximum consumption applies at or above run speed.
devNote: Intended to push Cloaking Device toward slower hide-and-seek play rather than high-speed stealth.

changeSummary: Evasive Dash charges decreased and cooldown decreased
changeText: Charges decreased from 3 to 2. Cooldown decreased from 7.5s to 6.5s.
devNote: Keeps the reduced-dash direction tested around Respec Order while lowering cooldown to preserve mobility cadence.

changeSummary: Winch Claw close-range stun windows reduced
changeText: Minimum victim stun decreased from 0.25s to 0.1s. Victim locked-in-place duration at destination decreased from 0.15s to 0.1s. User can act sooner after grabbing a player, from 0.25s to 0.1s.
devNote: Reduces the advantage of close-range mini-stun usage while preserving gap-closing displacement.

changeSummary: .50 Akimbo damage increased from 44 to 46
changeText: Increased damage from 44 to 46.
devNote: Buffs an under-used Heavy weapon.

changeSummary: 93R damage decreased and ammo increased
changeText: Damage decreased from 25 to 24. Ammo count increased from 21 to 27.
devNote: Returns damage closer to pre-10.3 values while adding magazine capacity.

changeSummary: FCAR fire rate decreased from 540 RPM to 530 RPM
changeText: Decreased fire rate from 540 RPM to 530 RPM.
devNote: Splits the difference after the prior FCAR buff pushed it above other Medium weapons.

changeSummary: KS-23 damage increased with lower range falloff multiplier
changeText: Damage increased from 100 to 110. Damage falloff multiplier decreased from 0.7 to 0.64, meaning slightly less damage at range.
devNote: Improves close-range combat value while retaining similar distant damage.

changeSummary: M134 Minigun dispersion and environmental damage improved
changeText: Dispersion decreased in all aim states by 10%. Dispersion scales up less aggressively when moving the camera quickly. Environmental damage increased from 30 to 35.
devNote: Improves Minigun effectiveness and meta viability.

changeSummary: Model 1887 pellet damage increased from 12 to 13
changeText: Increased pellet damage from 12 to 13.
devNote: Damage boost to help Model 1887 viability.

changeSummary: Pike-556 headshot multiplier increased from 1.5 to 1.75
changeText: Increased headshot damage multiplier from 1.5 to 1.75.
devNote: Adds a granular headshot multiplier to improve Pike-556 without overcorrecting.
